body:
## Summary

Fixes #112.

- Reworked the mobile drawer to use the full visual viewport width, added a `Menu` section before conversations, and moved all topbar actions into that drawer section with full labels.
- Replaced the font hamburger glyph with a fixed-size CSS icon and updated the mobile composer to auto-resize to content, keep balanced padding, and cap itself to half of the visible chat space.
- Added append-only conversation soft delete via `conversation_deleted` events, with deleted conversations hidden by default and visible through a separate toggle.
- Expanded the tool seed to cover all supported demo/browser tools and added localized tool names/descriptions for Russian, Chinese, and Hindi.
- Expanded example prompts to cover the supported prompt families and added issue #112 case-study evidence under `docs/case-studies/issue-112/`.

## iOS Accessory Bar Note

The iOS Safari up/down/Done accessory bar is browser/platform UI. This PR adds reliable web-level mitigations (`autocomplete`, `autocorrect`, `enterkeyhint="send"`, visual viewport sizing), but does not claim to remove that Safari-controlled toolbar because there is no standards-backed switch for it.

## Reproduction And Tests

- Reproducing coverage: `cd tests/e2e && npm run test:local -- --grep "Issue #112"` verifies drawer actions/width, composer resizing, soft-delete visibility, localized tool registry, and complete example prompt coverage.
- Targeted issue #112 e2e: 5 passed.
- Full Playwright local suite: `cd tests/e2e && npm run test:local`: 92 passed.
- JavaScript syntax: `node --check src/web/app.js`, `src/web/i18n.js`, `src/web/seed_loader.js`, and `tests/e2e/tests/multilingual.spec.js` passed.
- Rust/local CI checks: `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`, `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`, and `cargo test` passed. The file-size guard still reports existing warning-level notices for `src/solver_helpers.rs` and `src/seed.rs`.

## Screenshots

Original issue screenshot:

![Original mobile screenshot](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-112-248769046c3f/docs/case-studies/issue-112/screenshots/mobile-screenshot.png?raw=true)

After, full-width drawer with topbar actions before conversations:

![After mobile drawer](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-112-248769046c3f/docs/case-studies/issue-112/screenshots/after-mobile-drawer.png?raw=true)

After, auto-growing composer with balanced padding:

![After mobile composer](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-112-248769046c3f/docs/case-studies/issue-112/screenshots/after-mobile-composer.png?raw=true)

## Research Sources

- WHATWG `enterkeyhint`: https://html.spec.whatwg.org/dev/interaction.html#input-modalities:-the-enterkeyhint-attribute
- MDN `enterkeyhint`: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Reference/Global_attributes/enterkeyhint
- MDN VisualViewport: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/VisualViewport
- W3C VirtualKeyboard API: https://www.w3.org/TR/virtual-keyboard/
- WebKit accessory-bar behavior reference: https://bugs.webkit.org/show_bug.cgi?id=203292
title: Improve mobile chat UX and conversation management
